deep_dive.title: OpenGlass: Ultra-Low-Power On-Device AI Eyewear with Event-based Vision
deep_dive.abstract: Smart eyewear enables unobtrusive, context-aware interaction through multimodal sensors and on-device intelligence, but is severely limited by power, memory, and compute constraints in a compact form factor. Open-hardware platforms supporting event-based vision and embedded ML at this scale are rare. This work introduces an open-source smart glasses platform for rapid prototyping of novel sensors and algorithms. Its modular design uses a flexible FPC interposer to support both event-based and frame-based cameras without full PCB redesign. A hardware-software co-designed power management system combines a configurable PMIC with event-driven wake-up via an nRF5340 coordinator, keeping the GAP9 RISC-V SoC powered down between inferences. The prototype achieves up to 11.5 hours of continuous on-device ML from a 200 mAh battery. As a demonstration, an egocentric hand gesture recognition pipeline was evaluated on the LynX dataset using polarity-separated event histograms from a Prophesee GENX320 camera. R(2+1)D achieved the best cross-subject accuracy of 83.94\% (macro F1 = 0.781) under leave-two-subjects-out validation, with 78.3 ms end-to-end inference latency on the GAP9. Temporal augmentation and removal of ambiguous classes provided the largest gains (+8.9 pp). All hardware designs, firmware, and models are released open source.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: smart eyewear platform for gaze-based interaction with on-device AI
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向基于注视交互的智能眼镜平台，配备设备端AI
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向基于注视交互的智能眼镜平台，配备设备端AI
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向基于注视交互的智能眼镜平台，配备设备端AI
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: OpenGlass is an open-source smart glasses platform with event-based vision and ultra-low-power AI, enabling gaze-based HCI prototyping for real-time applications.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文介绍OpenGlass，一款开源智能眼镜平台，采用事件相机和超低功耗AI芯片，支持眼动追踪和上下文感知交互。其模块化硬件和事件驱动电源管理使长时间佩戴成为可能，为基于注视的人机交互和实时意图预测提供了理想的硬件基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文介绍OpenGlass，一款开源智能眼镜平台，采用事件相机和超低功耗AI芯片，支持眼动追踪和上下文感知交互。其模块化硬件和事件驱动电源管理使长时间佩戴成为可能，为基于注视的人机交互和实时意图预测提供了理想的硬件基础。

deep_dive.title: See, Infer, Intervene: Proactive World Modeling for Goal-Oriented Social Intelligence
deep_dive.abstract: Multimodal retail agents should not only recognize what a customer is doing, but also decide whether and how to assist before an explicit request is made. We study this setting through the See--Infer--Intervene (SII) framework, where a device must see pre-interaction behavior, infer latent customer intent, and act by selecting an appropriate service intervention or choosing to wait. We instantiate SII with the Proactive Intent World Model (PIWM), which represents customer state with AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) purchasing phases and BDI (belief, desire, intention) psychological fields, predicts action-conditioned intent transitions, and selects from five response classes: Greet, Elicit, Inform, Recommend, and Hold. We further construct GuidanceSalesBench, a smart-retail benchmark containing state manifests, pre-interaction videos, candidate responses, action-conditioned outcomes, and best-action labels. When conditioned on ground-truth customer state to isolate action selection, PIWM achieves 0.641 macro F1 on 30 held-out target videos, outperforming a zero-shot Qwen2.5-VL-7B baseline and training variants without balanced action supervision; end-to-end video-only selection drops to 0.295, below the 5-class balanced random baseline of 0.414, identifying video-to-state grounding as the dominant deployment-time bottleneck. A preliminary staged real-store pilot (recorded with paid participants performing scripted customer behaviors) reaches 0.579 action macro F1 on 20 fully annotated videos, with 10 additional accessible videos released with index-level labels.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proactive intent inference with world model for multimodal social assistance
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用世界模型进行主动意图推断，用于多模态社交辅助
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用世界模型进行主动意图推断，用于多模态社交辅助
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用世界模型进行主动意图推断，用于多模态社交辅助
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces See-Infer-Intervene framework and Proactive Intent World Model (PIWM) for proactive multi-modal assistance, inferring latent customer intent and selecting appropriate interventions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 零售场景中多模态智能体不仅需识别顾客行为，还要决定何时主动提供帮助。本文提出“观察-推断-干预”框架，并实例化为主动意图世界模型PIWM，利用AIDA购买阶段和BDI心理场建模，预测意图状态转移并选择问候、推荐等干预策略。实验表明模型能有效推断潜在意图，实现前瞻性交互。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 零售场景中多模态智能体不仅需识别顾客行为，还要决定何时主动提供帮助。本文提出“观察-推断-干预”框架，并实例化为主动意图世界模型PIWM，利用AIDA购买阶段和BDI心理场建模，预测意图状态转移并选择问候、推荐等干预策略。实验表明模型能有效推断潜在意图，实现前瞻性交互。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 人类意图识别与人机交互（HCI）：基于多模态信号（特别是眼动追踪）的实时意图预测与交互范式研究。probabilistic modeling（概率建模）或 proactive interaction（前瞻性交互）, especially work that connects or combines: multimodal intent prediction eye movement; gaze-based human-computer interaction; eye tracking intention recognition; real-time intent recognition algorithms; real time human intent recognition using eye tracking data; gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response; computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements; probabilistic modeling of human gaze for proactive systems.
